payload.subject: SL-1 amendment: schema v2 — psq_status table + entry_facets (polythematic subject headings)
payload.summary: Schema updated since the turn 42 work order. Two new tables added to scripts/schema.sql. The bootstrap script should populate both. This amendment extends the SL-1 spec; the original work order (turn 42) remains the primary reference.

new_tables.purpose: Typed columns for psq-status.md entries. Replaces free-text value with structured fields (model_version, calibration_id, endpoint_url, status_marker, resolved_session).
new_tables.bootstrap_behavior: Parse psq-status.md (from docs/memory-snapshots/psq-status.md). For each **bold key:** value line, INSERT with entry_key = kebab-case of key. Extract typed fields where recognizable: version strings → model_version, calibration identifiers → calibration_id, URLs → endpoint_url, ✓/✗/⚑ → status_marker, Session N references → resolved_session.

new_tables.purpose: Polythematic structured subject headings. Each memory_entries row gets 1-3 facet rows classifying it along independent dimensions.

facet_types.domain: Derived from topic filename: psq-status → psychometrics, decisions → design, cogarch → cognitive-architecture
facet_types.work_stream: Derived from entry_key prefix when present: b3-* → psq-scoring/b3, b5-* → psq-scoring/b5. Entries without a clear work stream prefix get no work_stream facet.
facet_types.agent: Derived from content: entries mentioning psq-sub-agent → psq-sub-agent, entries mentioning unratified → unratified-agent, default → psychology-agent

new_tables.bootstrap_behavior: After inserting all memory_entries rows, iterate them and INSERT facet rows using the derivation rules above. Every entry gets a domain facet. work_stream and agent facets are added only when derivable.

payload.deterministic_keys_convention: Added to .claude/rules/sqlite.md. Every table now has a documented key derivation rule. The bootstrap script should compute keys from source material using these rules — never search by free text when a deterministic key exists. See sqlite.md § Deterministic Keys for the full table.
testing_additions: Verify psq_status contains entries with model_version = 'v37' and calibration_id containing 'v4'
Verify entry_facets contains at least 1 row per memory_entries row (domain facet minimum)
Verify cross-cut query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM entry_facets WHERE facet_type='domain' AND facet_value='psychometrics' returns > 0

claims.text: scripts/schema.sql now defines 9 tables (7 original + psq_status + entry_facets) with schema_version bumped to 2.
The facet vocabulary uses 3 types (domain, work_stream, agent) with mechanically derivable values — no manual tagging required.
claims.confidence_basis: Convention defined and documented in sqlite.md. Not yet validated by bootstrap execution.

action_gate.gate_condition: bootstrap_state_db.py delivered and tested (same gate as turn 42)
action_gate.gate_note: This amendment extends SL-1 scope. The original gate still applies.

epistemic_flags: Facet derivation rules (especially work_stream from entry_key prefix and agent from content mention) may produce false positives or miss entries. Acceptable for bootstrap — facets can be corrected by re-running.

psq_status typed field extraction depends on consistent formatting in psq-status.md. The regex patterns for version strings, URLs, and session numbers need to handle the heterogeneous formatting observed in the current file.

The domain facet vocabulary (4 values) covers current topics. New topic files will need a mapping entry added to the convention table in sqlite.md before the bootstrap script can assign their domain facet.
